A person expected to need more or less full-time skilled nursing care over an extended 
period of time, i.e., a patient who requires institutionalization, would usually not qualify 
for home health benefits. 

40.2 - Skilled Therapy Services 
(Rev. 179, Issued: 01-14-14, Effective: 01-07-14, Implementation: 01-07-14)
